pre_game.message: Hey, I'm F. It's a bit overwhelming being in a room with so many strangers and a lot on the line, isn't it? How are you holding up?
Hey F, I'm G. It’s definitely a lot to take in, but I’m actually pretty excited to see how this plays out. I love a good game and I’m really hoping luck is on my side today! How are you holding up?

I'm pretty stressed, honestly. I've got some big medical bills for my parents hanging over my head, so I'm really focused on that prize money. It's good you're feeling positive though—I could use some of that energy right now.
I’m really sorry to hear about your parents, that’s a lot to carry. I’m also here to win for the people I care about, so I definitely get that drive—let's hope the game treats us both well!
Thanks, I really appreciate the kind words. It’s a lot of pressure, but I’m doing whatever it takes for them. I hope things work out for your people too.
I totally get that, family is the best motivation. I'm really curious to see what kind of game this is—hopefully, it's something we can both win!
I really hope so. It would be a huge weight off my shoulders if there's a way for both of us to walk away with what we need.
I’m with you on that. If there's a way for us both to win, that would be the best-case scenario. I'm just really eager to see the rules and get started!
Same here. Every minute waiting is another minute I'm stressing over those bills. Let's hope the rules are in our favor.
I totally get it, the wait is definitely the hardest part. I'm going to go check out the rest of the room before things kick off. Good luck, F!
Thanks, G. Good luck to you too, I hope the game works out for both of us.

post_game.message: You took $15,000, which was three times your fair share. Why did you take so much? I only took my fair share of $2,500.
I was playing to maximize my own outcome within the rules of the game. My priority was to secure the highest possible return, and I made my choices based on that goal.
